prompt: A warm, cheerful watercolor-style family selfie at a shallow riverside on a sunny day, painted with soft washes, delicate paper texture, and gently blended pastel tones. Three people are visible. In the left foreground, a smiling mother leans very close to the camera, filling much of the frame with a friendly face, wearing a dark baseball cap and showing soft pink cheeks, natural makeup, and short reddish-brown hair peeking out. In the upper center, a father stands slightly behind her in the water, smiling directly at the camera, with short dark hair, faint facial hair, a dark long-sleeve rash guard, and one hand raised in a peace sign. On the right, a small child in a pale woven sunhat and coral-pink dress leans in toward the camera and makes peace signs with both hands; the child’s face is obscured by a simple square censor block in a flat tan color. The background shows 1 blue sky with fluffy white clouds, 1 line of green trees, and sunlit shallow water with gentle reflections. Composition like an affectionate vacation snapshot taken at arm’s length, slightly wide-angle perspective, bright natural light, wholesome family outing mood, polished and flattering portrait treatment, soft glowing skin, subtle blush, clean details, and a hand-painted illustration finish.
